name: gmail_read
description: Read, list, and search emails from your Gmail account. Actions: list (recent inbox), search (Gmail query syntax), read (full email by ID).

action.description: Action to perform: 'list' (recent inbox emails), 'search' (search with Gmail query), or 'read' (get full email by message_id)

query.description: Gmail search query for 'search' action. Supports: from:, to:, subject:, has:attachment, is:unread, after:2024/01/01, label:, etc.

message_id.description: Gmail message ID for 'read' action. Get this from list or search results.

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default 10, max 50)
